node.excerpt: I'm 23 years old Software Developer residing in India. As the name suggests this blog is about my thoughts and things I like. My thoughts are as random as random things can get. From Computers and Chess to Philosophy and Psychology. This should give us wide range of topics to talk about :)
node.title: About Me

node.excerpt: Wow! I love blogging so much already. Its 3 AM in the morning. Setting up this blog took me close to 3 hours. Time just flew by me. This officially is my first blog post.
node.title: Hello World!
